Member Resource

2025 Annual Update: Facts & Figures

The most current federal benefits data to help you plan confidently for retirement.

Revised January 2025
As a financial professional, your clients rely on you to have the most up-to-date and accurate information to assist them in planning for their financial future. Below, you will find the facts and figures for 2024, 2025 and a 10-year historical average when appropriate. Please consult with your firm's written planning guidance for the appropriate use of this data with respect to preparing a federal benefits report, or in the development of a financial plan.

CSRS & FERS Pension

Item 2024 2025 10-Year Avg
National pay raise (without locality pay increase) 4.70% 1.70% 2.11%
National pay raise (with average locality pay increase) 5.20% 2.00% 2.49%
CSRS COLA in retirement 3.20% 2.50% 2.83%
FERS COLA in retirement 2.20% 2.00% 2.40%
Special Retirement Supplement earnings test limit $22,320 $23,400 —

CSRS & FERS Death Benefits

Item 2024 2025
Lump-sum, in-service death benefits (FERS) $41,568 $42,607
Children's Survivor Benefits (Monthly)
If no parent living (per child up to 3) $787 $806
If one parent living (per child up to 3) $658 $674

Social Security & Medicare

Item 2024 2025 10-Year Avg
Social Security COLA (CPI-W) 3.20% 2.50% 2.83%
Social Security earnings test limit $22,320 $23,400 —
PIA formula (first bend) $1,174 $1,226 —
PIA formula (second bend) $7,078 $7,391 —
Social Security Substantial Earnings Minimum $31,613 $33,019 —
Social Security Maximum Taxable Earnings $168,600 $176,100 —
Medicare Part B Premium (monthly) $174.70 $185.00 4.38%

Federal Employee Health Benefits

Item 2024 2025 10-Year Avg
Average premium increase all carriers 7.70% 13.50% 5.66%

Thrift Savings Plan

Item 2024 2025
Elective deferral limit (annual) $23,000 $23,500
Catch-up contribution limit for age 50+ (annual) $7,500 $7,500
Catch-up contribution limit for age 60–63 (annual) N/A $11,250
Rates of Return (Compound Annual) EOY 2023 EOY 2024 10-Year
G Fund +4.22% +4.40% +2.52%
F Fund +5.58% +1.33% +1.49%
C Fund +26.26% +24.96% +13.09%
S Fund +25.30% +16.93% +9.52%
I Fund +18.38% +4.27% +5.63%

Need Help Understanding Your Federal Benefits?

Our advisors specialize in FERS retirement, TSP optimization, and tax-efficient withdrawal strategies for federal employees.

Schedule a Consultation

The information presented is for educational purposes only and should not be considered financial, tax, or legal advice. Please consult with a qualified financial professional before making any decisions regarding your federal benefits or retirement planning.

Data sourced from the Office of Personnel Management (OPM), Social Security Administration (SSA), Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS), and the Federal Retirement Thrift Investment Board. 10-year averages are calculated from publicly available historical data where applicable.
